## Summary

Describe the documentation change and why it improves technical accuracy.

## Evidence

Link primary sources such as verified deployed contract code, an exact Ethereum transaction and block, official Uniswap documentation, or a reproducible read-only contract call.

> Do not publish unresolved vulnerability or exploit details in a pull request. Use [GitHub Private Vulnerability Reporting](https://github.com/SATO-Community/sato-docs/security/advisories/new).

## Checklist

- [ ] Addresses, selectors, units, decimals, and links are verified.
- [ ] Dynamic metrics include a block number and UTC timestamp, or explain how readers can verify them live.
- [ ] Observations are separated from interpretation.
- [ ] No secrets, wallet material, personal data, or private infrastructure are included.
- [ ] This change does not disclose an unresolved security issue.
